title: Polystichum truncatum
intro: Polystichum truncatum, also known as the truncatum holly fern, is a species of fern native to China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The bioactive constituents of Polystichum truncatum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to prepare teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are also available in modern herbal supplement forms.
taxonomy: Polystichum truncatum belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This species is a type of fern and is classified under the phylum Pteridophyta.
